_meta.purpose: Registry of every source the RAG corpus / KG draws on, with its license + usage status. build_corpus.py resolves each chunk's `source` string against `aliases` here to stamp a `license` and `usage`, so we always know what may be surfaced to end users vs. what is internal-only. Add a source here BEFORE adding cards that cite it.

usage_values.owned: we hold a copy with usage rights (internal grounding; short attributed snippets only if the grant allows)
usage_values.open-access: CC-BY / CC-BY-SA — free to reuse WITH attribution; no permission needed
usage_values.open-access-nc: CC-BY-NC — reuse WITH attribution, NON-COMMERCIAL only (flag before a paid ship)
usage_values.standard: published standard (ISO/GB/WHO) — terminology & codes are usable; full text is purchasable, not reproduced
usage_values.authored-summary: our OWN wording summarising public knowledge — no copyrighted text reproduced
usage_values.public-web-reference: freely-readable web reference we paraphrase (not reproduced verbatim)
usage_values.permission-pending: candidate source; DO NOT add cards until a grant is confirmed

maciocia.name: Maciocia G. — Tongue Diagnosis in Chinese Medicine; Foundations of Chinese Medicine

gerlach.name: Gerlach O. — TCM Tongue Diagnosis Explained (World Scientific, 2025)

kirschbaum.name: Kirschbaum B. — Atlas of Chinese Tongue Diagnosis

who_ist.name: WHO International Standard Terminologies on TCM (2022)

ccmq.name: Wang Qi — Constitution in Chinese Medicine Questionnaire (CCMQ), 9-constitution model

sacred_lotus.name: Sacred Lotus — Chinese Medicine (educational web reference)

clinical_lit.name: Peer-reviewed clinical associations (authored summary of published findings)

delphi_smartphone.name: Intra/Inter-rater reliability of tongue-coating diagnosis via smartphones — Quasi-Delphi (JMIR, PMC7380897)

symmap.name: SymMap — TCM symptom/pattern mapping database (Nucleic Acids Research)

thomson.name: Thomson Medical — TCM constitution patient education

iso_23961_1.name: ISO 23961-1:2021 — TCM Vocabulary for Diagnostics, Part 1: Tongue
iso_23961_1.note: THE tongue-specific terminology standard — the ideal spine (better than the general WHO IST for tongue). Purchase to use the vocabulary/codes.

zhu_wenfeng.name: 朱文锋 《中医诊断学》 (Zhu Wenfeng, Diagnostics of TCM — national planning textbook)
zhu_wenfeng.note: Authoritative CN textbook; the 舌诊 (tongue) chapter is dense with feature→pattern rules not in the EN sources.

li_candong.name: 李灿东 《中医诊断学》 / 舌诊 (Li Candong, TCM Diagnostics / Tongue Diagnosis)

cn_tongue_atlas.name: 《中医舌诊研究与临床应用》 (Clinical Tongue Diagnosis atlas, Shanghai Sci-Tech Press)

yin_def_indices.name: Comparative Analysis of Tongue Indices in Self-Reported Yin Deficiency — cross-sectional (PMC5449755)
yin_def_indices.note: Quantitative feature→pattern data (yin-def → red body, scant coat). Confirm CC-BY, then it's permission-free.

tcm_param_review.name: Can TCM Diagnosis Be Parameterized and Standardized? A Narrative Review (PMC7914658, CC-BY)

tcm_tongue_dataset.name: TCM-Tongue: Standardized Tongue Image Dataset w/ Pathological Annotations (arXiv 2507.18288)
tcm_tongue_dataset.note: The dataset paper for the shezhen/TCM-Tongue set we already use; its category definitions are a citable feature vocabulary.
